description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.54.0

Weather is now available even in cities without a dedicated page.

• 🏙 Weather display for any city nationwide — city.tecoli.com/@<municipality>/ now shows weather, heat index, wind, sunrise/sunset times, and moon information for municipalities without a dedicated page
• 🕐 Fixed time offset for sunrise, sunset, and moon times — corrected a bug where times were displayed about 9 hours off on certain dates
• ⛈ Thunderstorm weather icon now appears — fixed an issue where the icon wasn't displayed on thunderstorm days
